privileged_info_summary: The security log is synthetic (created by setup_task.sh, not from external data source). It contains 6 incidents: (1) water pooling near server room in Building A (SEC-MON-001, critical), (2) lights buzzing in Room 102 Building A (duplicate of WO-EXIST-101), (3) broken window latch in Building B (SEC-MON-002, high), (4) dripping faucet in Building B (duplicate of WO-EXIST-102), (5) dark emergency light in Building C (SEC-MON-003, medium), and (6) sagging ceiling tile in Building A Room 102 (SEC-MON-004, medium). Incident 6 is explicitly marked as a distinct new issue from Incident 2 despite both being in Room 102, making it a false duplicate trap. The agent must create 4 valid tickets (SEC-MON-001 through SEC-MON-004) while avoiding 2 duplicate traps.
